## All (8) ((8 results))
- 1. Canadian pipeline transport of oil and other liquid petroleum products, monthly Table: 25-10-0056-01 Geography: Canada, Province or territory Frequency: Monthly Description: Crude oil and liquid petroleum products (propane and butane) receipts, deliveries, inventories, imports and exports transported by Canadian pipelines in cubic metres and barrels ... Description: Crude oil and liquid petroleum products (propane and butane) receipts, deliveries, inventories, imports and exports transported by Canadian pipelines in cubic metres and barrels, monthly, January 2016 to present. More Release date: 2020-02-20
- 2. Canadian crude oil, liquefied petroleum gases (LPG) and products, monthly inventories Table: 25-10-0037-01 Geography: Canada Frequency: Monthly Description: Data presented at the national level by source of inventories (total inventories in Canada and the United States, held in Canada, and Canadian products held in the United States), by ... Description: Data presented at the national level by source of inventories (total inventories in Canada and the United States, held in Canada, and Canadian products held in the United States), by inventory characteristics (shippers, carriers, lines and tanks, etc) and by inventories of liquid hydrocarbons (crude oil and pentanes plus as well as liquefied petroleum gases (LPG) and refined petroleum products). More Release date: 2016-04-20
- 3. Canadian pipelines, monthly operating statistics Table: 25-10-0038-01 Geography: Canada Frequency: Monthly Description: Data presented at the national level by type of liquid hydrocarbons (crude oil and pentanes plus as wells as liquefied petroleum gases (LPG), and refined petroleum products) and by ... Description: Data presented at the national level by type of liquid hydrocarbons (crude oil and pentanes plus as wells as liquefied petroleum gases (LPG), and refined petroleum products) and by operating statistics (total cubic metre-kilometres and average kilometres per cubic metre). More Release date: 2016-04-20
- 4. Pipeline movements, monthly summary Table: 25-10-0039-01 Geography: Canada, Province or territory Frequency: Monthly Description: Data presented at the national and provincial levels, by pipeline movements (net receipts, transfers, etc) for liquid hydrocarbons (crude oil and pentanes plus). Not all combinations ... Description: Data presented at the national and provincial levels, by pipeline movements (net receipts, transfers, etc) for liquid hydrocarbons (crude oil and pentanes plus). Not all combinations are available. More Release date: 2016-04-20
- 5. Crude oil and pentanes plus, monthly receipts and disposition by source Table: 25-10-0040-01 Geography: Canada, Province or territory Frequency: Monthly Description: Data presented at the national and provincial levels for receipts and disposition of crude oil and pentanes plus in cubic metres. Not all combinations are available. Release date: 2016-04-20
- 6. Canadian oil pipeline carriers, monthly operating statistics Table: 25-10-0067-01 Geography: Canada Frequency: Monthly Description: Data presented at the national level by product (crude oil and oil products), estimates (cubic metres, tonnes and kilometres), and by operating statistics (net receipts, cubic ... Description: Data presented at the national level by product (crude oil and oil products), estimates (cubic metres, tonnes and kilometres), and by operating statistics (net receipts, cubic metre-kilometres, and tonne-kilometres). More Release date: 2016-04-20
- 7. Pipeline Transportation of Crude Oil and Refined Petroleum Products Archived Table: 55-201-X Description: The publication presents information from companies primarily engaged in the gathering and transportation of crude oil and liquefied petroleum gases to refineries and for export. ... Description: The publication presents information from companies primarily engaged in the gathering and transportation of crude oil and liquefied petroleum gases to refineries and for export. Details include: operating revenue/expenses, employment and payroll, balance sheet data, pumping stations, pipeline length and truck line systems, receipts and disposition of crude oil, summary of pipeline movements of crude oil and equivalent and liquified petroleum gases. More Release date: 2003-01-10
The publication presents information from companies primarily engaged in the gathering and transportation of crude oil and liquefied petroleum gases to refineries and for export. ...
The publication presents information from companies primarily engaged in the gathering and transportation of crude oil and liquefied petroleum gases to refineries and for export. Details include: operating revenue/expenses, employment and payroll, balance sheet data, pumping stations, pipeline length and truck line systems, receipts and disposition of crude oil, summary of pipeline movements of crude oil and equivalent and liquified petroleum gases.
- 8. Pipeline Transportation of Crude Oil and Refined Petroleum Products, monthly Archived Table: 55-001-X Description: This on-line publication covers the activities of the major pipelines carrying crude oil and equivalents, liquefied petroleum gases such as propane, butane, ethane and others within ... Description: This on-line publication covers the activities of the major pipelines carrying crude oil and equivalents, liquefied petroleum gases such as propane, butane, ethane and others within and between provinces. The data are collected by province for receipts, deliveries, imports, exports and inventories. More Release date: 2002-07-24
This on-line publication covers the activities of the major pipelines carrying crude oil and equivalents, liquefied petroleum gases such as propane, butane, ethane and others within ...
This on-line publication covers the activities of the major pipelines carrying crude oil and equivalents, liquefied petroleum gases such as propane, butane, ethane and others within and between provinces. The data are collected by province for receipts, deliveries, imports, exports and inventories.

This on-line publication covers the activities of the major pipelines carrying crude oil and equivalents, liquefied petroleum gases such as propane, butane, ethane and others within and between provinces. The data are collected by province for receipts, deliveries, imports, exports and inventories.
The Sort by feature provides four options:
- By date – sorts results by product release date starting with the most recent.
- By most popular – gives priority to results that are most frequently selected by users, followed by the most recent.
- By relevance is only needed or beneficial when you use the search box and submit a search query. Results are ordered by a combination of where the search term appears in the content, e.g., if it appears in the title, it likely means the product is more relevant to your search; how up to date or new the content in the product is; how popular the product is; and other factors.
- By title – sorts results alphabetically.
The Sort by feature provides three options:
- By date – sorts results by product release date starting with the most recent.
- By relevance is only needed or beneficial when you use the search box and submit a search query. Results are ordered by a combination of where the search term appears in the content, e.g., if it appears in the title, it likely means the product is more relevant to your search; how up to date or new the content in the product is; how popular the product is; and other factors.
- By title – sorts results alphabetically.
- You can initiate a search by entering keywords or selecting filters (e.g., under Subject, Geography , etc.) on the left side of the page.
You can initiate a search by entering keywords or selecting filters (e.g., under Subject, Geography , etc.) on the left side of the page.
- Filters can be used together or in any combination. Each time you select a filter, the results on the page are updated.
Filters can be used together or in any combination. Each time you select a filter, the results on the page are updated.
- To start a new search, click on the Clear all button above the search box or deselect each filter.
To start a new search, click on the Clear all button above the search box or deselect each filter.
- Specified keywords and filters appear above the search box. You can deselect any or all the tags to refine or clear your search.
Specified keywords and filters appear above the search box. You can deselect any or all the tags to refine or clear your search.
- You can enter keywords in the search box. It is not necessary to use “+” or “, “ or “AND”.
You can enter keywords in the search box. It is not necessary to use “+” or “, “ or “AND”.
- You can delete some or all of the keywords from your search string.
You can delete some or all of the keywords from your search string.
- Quotes around keywords limit the search to a specific phrase. For example, “labour force survey” will limit results to products containing this phrase.
Quotes around keywords limit the search to a specific phrase.
- For example, “labour force survey” will limit results to products containing this phrase.
For example, “labour force survey” will limit results to products containing this phrase.
- Use “or” between keywords to obtain results that contain one or more search terms. For example, labour or­ force or survey will limit results to products containing any or all of these words.
Use “or” between keywords to obtain results that contain one or more search terms.
- For example, labour or­ force or survey will limit results to products containing any or all of these words.
For example, labour or­ force or survey will limit results to products containing any or all of these words.
- This search looks for results that have your query term in the title, description, subject, geography, product number or other information about the product. For example, when searching the term ‘Diseases’, all results with the word ‘Diseases’ in the title, description or tagged the subject appear.

- For example, when searching the term ‘Diseases’, all results with the word ‘Diseases’ in the title, description or tagged the subject appear.

- The text within an article or publication are not searched. For full text searching of articles, use the site search .
The text within an article or publication are not searched. For full text searching of articles, use the site search .
